Dictionary lookup test

Long-press each word; the gloss is on the line below it.

eau

= water

feu

= fire

montagne

= mountain

rivière

= river

arbre

= tree

personne

= person

chien

= dog

chat

= cat

poisson

= fish

oiseau

= bird

fleur

= flower

ciel

= sky

mer

= sea

lune

= moon

soleil

= sun

étoile

= star

pluie

= rain

neige

= snow

vent

= wind

nuage

= cloud

livre

= book

voiture

= car

maison

= house

école

= school

professeur

= teacher

élève

= student

ami

= friend

mère

= mother

père

= father

enfant

= child

amour

= love

manger

= to eat

boire

= to drink

voir

= to see

entendre

= to hear

parler

= to speak

lire

= to read

écrire

= to write

même

= same, even

café

= coffee

grand

= big

petit

= small
